textByHashes.90fa5c311f8355365b2196d983b30e23559e0d8c: Hey you Creature, I know's what you is You's a 'uman!
textByHashes.5f8d53712fa3042a364fcfaef607499ce9177556: Dat's great...Dad want's to hunt da chompy... Da chompy is our bestest yumms! You needsing flufsies for stabbers, Fycie have some but I is wanting some bright pretties for em!
textByHashes.9ccc66177f0987b07ce81bc18e64b8a46075c539: Mee's wants lots of bright pretties, this many! ~ Fycie quickly opens and closes her hands in front ~ ~ of you to indicate a number of bright pretties. ~ ~ It looks like she wants 50 gold coins.~
textByHashes.669593d8eaf8eff7aa855efd1859ad67baee7a4a: You's not got da bright pretties... I wants da bright pretties..you not get no flufsies wid'out da bright pretties.
textByHashes.a1b0dbb83ee789acf37868899b34c51ba66c4e6b: Ok, dat's a good 'un, I got da bright pretties and you got da flufsies!
textByHashes.580f9a5e1e9496af589262bc6999a6b63526cde6: Well, you not have da flufsies den!
textByHashes.6d3d593418aed5eab5cc397c0ccf40d32f08773f: I's sorry creature, I don't got no more flufsies! But I got lots of bright pretties! Hope you's get da stabbers for Dad soonly!
textByHashes.8167612a3bcf108b44e50d24d087036c890b26d8: Oh we sometimes is using blower on da toadies but Dad don't let us get in da locksy bocksy no more. He, he, big chuklees when make da toadies fat on da swampy gas.
textByHashes.2a3a6b93c925f06dc87e1deb89e160f27e54507d: You's better talk to Dad, him chasey sneaky chompy.
textByHashes.92d0c434320d94975289f25492e541faee907574: Dad say's you's roastling da chompy for us! Slurp! Me's wants tomato wiv mine! Yummy, can't wait to eats it.
textByHashes.c1b5cde03754162c8ff3e6b3373ad2a69bec3b1c: Dad say's you's roastling da chompy for us! Slurp! Me's wants doogle leaves wiv mine! Yummy, can't wait to eats it.
textByHashes.233fa78fe03b0e1f95f28d98afe3499a5df3748b: Go talk to Dad, him chasey sneaky chompy.
textByHashes.eaab942f3ca11b2d7e6b24894213bed5ee38c2d5: You's better talk to Dad, We not talk to wierdly 'umans.
textByHashes.b9728e1b18a97663c22c12bfcef53aca37d7bb41: Thanks for da chompy, it was deloverly!
